long_description:
We need to restart the pods in the in-che regions the memory is increasing and we are working on finding the cause for it.
Incident source: https://ibm-cloudplatform.slack.com/archives/C0A0P87RYAG/p1764565878042599 - Phanindra (IaaS CORE)
short_description: restart the resource-metadata-service pods in the in-che regions
